title: Pinky Beauty Parlour
overview: Two sisters named Pinky and Bulbul own and operate a beauty salon in Banaras. One morning, a dead body is discovered in their parlour, sparking an investigation. As the case develops, the vibrant world of beauty salons and our society's deep-seated obsession with fair skin begin to come to light.
